page_content:
BSST389 Internship in Terrorism Studies (1-6 Credits) Supplements student's experiential learning experience, or internship in the ﬁeld of terrorism studies and homeland security, with guided reflection on their experiences. Restriction: Must have earned a minimum cumulative GPA of 2.5. Repeatable to: 9 credits.

BSST398 Individual Study in Terrorism Studies II (1-3 Credits) An independent study course for START Students. Repeatable to: 9 credits if content differs.

CCJS - Criminology and Criminal Justice

BSST399 Individual Study in Terrorism Studies (1-3 Credits) An independent study course for students in the Global Terrorism Minor program. Repeatable to: 9 credits if content differs.

BSST458 Special Topics in Study Abroad IV (1-6 Credits) Special topics course taken as part of an approved study abroad program. Repeatable to: 15 credits if content differs.
